lenses.label: Verbatim density
lenses.description: Exact match in voice.key_expressions[] with sample_size >= 5 -> maximum. Semantic match in verbatim_quotes[] with high emotional weight -> strong. No anchor, formula-derived only -> low (cell survives only if no grounded alternative in cluster).

lenses.label: Awareness-acquisition alignment
lenses.description: Cell awareness_stage x brand.market.awareness_distribution (or audience-level fallback) x strategy.current_focus.acquisition_focus. Cross-reference routing/awareness-angle-matrix.md to filter angles in the 'avoid' column for dominant awareness stage.

lenses.label: Emotional resonance
lenses.description: Cell emotion alignment with audience.psychology.jtbd.emotional_driver and psychology.emotions[] dominant.

lenses.label: Objection neutralization
lenses.description: Cell objection x product.proofs.* strength match per proof-registry.md mapping. Clinical trial neutralizes scepticism, risk-reversal neutralizes price hesitation, press quote neutralizes trust gap. Unmapped objection -> flag un-neutralizable, drop cell.

lenses.label: Placement viability
lenses.description: Binary filter, not weight. Cell hook length and format constraint per placement. Reels = 3s pattern interrupt. Stories = swipe-up curiosity. Feed UGC = identification. TikTok = native vernacular. Fail = drop cell. Pass = neutral (no point bonus).

_weights_invariant.verification: verbatim_density (35) + awareness_alignment (25) + emotional_resonance (20) + objection_neutralization (20) = 100. placement_viability is a binary filter, not weighted.

cluster_dedupe_rule.similarity_test: Two cells are similar when they share: same dominant pain (theme + emotion) AND same dominant objection AND same placement.
cluster_dedupe_rule.action: Keep the highest-scored cell per cluster, drop the rest. When two cells differ only on placement (same pain + same objection + same emotion, Reels vs Stories), surface as ONE angle with two placement variants in the artifact footnote, NOT two separate rows.

anchor_priority.rule: For each ranked cell, select the hook anchor in this priority. See paid-angle-scoring.md Section 4 for details.

output_caps.wide_test_trigger: Top 3 cells score above the high-density threshold AND operator stated a wide-test objective ('je lance un test large', 'vague d'ouverture', 'sortir 7 angles a tester').

voice_consistency_cross_block.description: On multi-block outputs (sequence of hooks for one campaign), persona + lexical_register stay stable +/- 1 step across all blocks. Drift = MAJOR violation, refuse-to-ship.

emotional_diversity_check.description: Top N angles must not collapse to the same emotional driver category. If top 5 are all loss-aversion-driven, the cluster filter has failed at the emotional-driver layer. Flag MAJOR, regenerate with explicit driver diversity constraint.

risk_bet_slot.description: Optional slot for breakthrough mode. When operator passes --mode=breakthrough, the output ranked table includes 5 safe + 1 risk_bet (max). The bet cell carries bet=true, anchor=null (verbatim-anchor suspended), hypothesis_to_test (declared in plain language by operator).
risk_bet_slot.post_test_routing: Validated -> promote to canon learning. Falsified -> [SUPERSEDED] in learnings.

anti_patterns.name: improvised_weights
anti_patterns.symptom: Skill author overrides 35/25/20/20 with custom weights inline.
anti_patterns.fix: Refuse. Weights live in this file, versioned. To propose new weights, bump _version and add migration path.

anti_patterns.name: score_leakage
anti_patterns.fix: Layer A trace only. Operator sees prose synthesis + ranked table without scores.

anti_patterns.name: permutation_without_pivot
anti_patterns.symptom: Top 5 angles paraphrase the same emotional driver.

_change_log.change: Initial externalization from paid-angle-scoring.md prose. Added voice_consistency_cross_block + emotional_diversity_check transverse invariants and risk_bet_slot for breakthrough mode.
